senior.summary: Extended agentguard init studio wizard to detect and configure all 6 drivers. Added Codex CLI (.codex), Gemini CLI (.gemini), and Goose (.goose) to detectProject(). Refactored step 6 from Claude-Code-only to a data-driven loop over all 5 hook-configurable drivers. Updated summary to show all configured hooks. Added 5 new unit tests. No pre-existing TS errors added. PR: AgentGuardHQ/agentguard#1339. Vitest environment broken locally (symlink to deleted worktree) — CI will verify tests.
